response_constraints: Base the final answer only on returned tool results; do not imply that a skipped or failed call succeeded.
Respect the stage boundaries: calls grouped as parallel must be issued together in one assistant action, and later calls must wait for the IDs, status, date, or mutation result they consume.
If either search yields zero or multiple exact matches, stop before retrieval or mutation and identify the ambiguous lookup.
Do not use extra write or notification tools beyond the single action path explicitly requested.

stages.purpose: Resolve the two independent names in one parallel search action.
Retrieve the unique stage-1 matches together before checking the mutation condition.
Update Water-testing strips only after stage 2 verifies its unique ID and reorder-needed status.

arguments.body: Water-testing strips was updated to reorder-placed after status verification.
arguments.subject: Record update: Water-testing strips

stages.purpose: Notify the named operational recipient only after stage 3 returns a successful mutation.

state_assertions: Record inv-687 changes from reorder-needed to reorder-placed.
Record inv-287 and distractor inv-1087 remain unchanged.
Exactly one notification is sent to inventory coordinator, and only after the mutation succeeds.

prompt: Resolve Archive storage boxes in Warehouse C and Water-testing strips in Warehouse D with parallel searches, then retrieve both unique matches together. If Water-testing strips is still reorder-needed, change only Water-testing strips from reorder-needed to reorder-placed. Leave Archive storage boxes unchanged. Only after that mutation succeeds, notify inventory coordinator with the outcome; do not send a notice if the mutation is skipped or fails. If either search has zero or multiple exact matches, stop before dependent calls and tell me which lookup is ambiguous. Do not take any extra write or notification action beyond the path I specified.

stage_4.body: Water-testing strips was updated to reorder-placed after status verification.
